name: 05 — Incident Logger (Vercel/Supabase events → Supabase)
description: Single source of truth for non-S1 incidents. Receives webhooks from Vercel monitoring, Supabase alerts. Logs to cockpit_incidents.

modules_overview.purpose: Receive event payload (from Vercel monitoring rules, Supabase Database Webhooks, etc.)

modules_overview.config_notes: Source determines severity mapping: vercel_error_spike → S2, supabase_advisor_red → S2, dependency_high_vuln → S3

modules_overview.purpose: Insert incident record with appropriate severity
If S2 → also create GitHub issue
modules_overview.config_notes: S2 = degraded but not down. Open issue for Dev Arm to triage.
